perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a Chiikawa-themed canned badge in its packaging. (2) It transitions to a wooden tabletop where several pink blind boxes are being placed. (3) A woman with long light-brown hair and a grey tank top appears, holding several boxes and pointing to the illustration of all 12 variations on the back of one box. (4) She proceeds to unbox the items one by one, holding each revealed badge close to the camera while making various excited facial expressions and winking. (5) Each badge is shown individually with a number overlay (No. 10, 12, 3, 9, 8). (6) The video ends with a montage display of the five badges she unboxed and a final shot of them lined up on the table.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-energy electronic music with a bright melody begins immediately. (2) A high-pitched, excited female voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing the products and mentioning their price and purchase location. (3) Throughout the unboxing, various sound effects (SFX) are heard, including a 'pop' or 'ding' when an item is revealed, and subtle rustling sounds of packaging being opened. (4) The music remains constant in intensity until the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '吉伊卡哇罐頭徽章' (Chiikawa Canned Badges) and '全家販售中！ (140元/個) 共12款！' (On sale at FamilyMart! 140 TWD/each, 12 styles total!) appearing as hooks. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Sequential numbers '編號10', '編號12', '編號3', '編號9', '編號8' appear to identify the items. (3) Functional Text: '以下留言告訴我, 你最想要哪一款?' (Comment below and tell me which one you want most?) serves as a call to action at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Description -> Serial Unboxing -> Final Showcase

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing the unboxing.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long, dyed light-brown hair, wearing a grey ribbed tank top and a beaded bracelet.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Alternates between a plain white wall in the talking-head shots and a light wood-grain tabletop for product close-ups.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the experience of unboxing a specific collection of blind-box Chiikawa canned badges, providing information on where to buy them and their price, while generating excitement among fans of the IP.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed mention of product price (140 TWD) and specific retail location (FamilyMart) in the text overlay.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast-paced jump cuts synced with bright sound effects and animated facial reactions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages the 'Chiikawa' trend which is highly popular in Taiwan and Japan, using high-energy unboxing tropes to maximize engagement.
